---
pagetitle: "Hacky Hour"
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div>
    <h2 class="mb-0" style="border-bottom: none;">
        <span class="fw-bold">Hacky</span>
        <span class="fw-light"> Hour</span>
    </h2>
</div>
<div class="container px-0 mb-2">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
        <div class="col-md-9 p-0">
            <p style="line-height: 1.6; text-align: justify;">
                Come along to talk about code, research tools, and open science in a social environment!
                We hold sessions on the last Monday of the month, in person at Wikipedia Munich,
                Angertorstraße 3, Munich, from 16:30 to 18:00. Each session has a theme. If you have
                a related problem, bring it along to work on it and get help or pointers! We will ensure
                that there is at least one knowledgeable person in the room, and a facilitator to keep
                things in check (and order pizza).
                <br><br>
                <strong>Typical Session Agenda:</strong>
                <ul>
                    <li>
                        Brief round of introductions and description of the problems you’ll be working on during that session
                    </li>
                    <li>
                        Formation of possible groups or tandems, if participants have tips to exchange on certain topics
                    </li>
                    <li>Hack</li>
                    <li>Wrap-up: progress and next steps</li>
                </ul>
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <img src="images/hackyhour.svg" class="img-fluid" style="max-height:150px;" alt="Hacky Hour logo">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- Past activity note -->
<div class="alert alert-success text-success" role="alert" style="font-style:italic; font-size:0.95rem;">
    Hacky Hour was active in 2024. Any interested parties wanting support to revive it or support for a one-off event can contact the LMU Open Science Center coordinator, <a href="mailto:malika.ihle@lmu.de" class="text-success">Dr. Malika Ihle</a>
</div>

<div class="container px-0">
    <h4 class="mb-2" style="border-bottom: none; color: var(--osc-accent);">
        Get Involved
    </h4>
    <p style="line-height: 1.6;" class="mb-3">
        You can contact <a href="mailto:malika.ihle@lmu.de" class="text-success">
        Dr. Malika Ihle </a> or subscribe to our mailing list to get reminders or suggest themes. You can also join the <a href="https://www.lmu.de/en/about-lmu/structure/central-university-administration/it-services-division-vi/it-service-desk/central-it-services/lmu-chat-matrix/" class="text-success">LMU Chat</a>, under the Open-Science-Center Team's OSC-hacky-hour channel.
    </p>
    <div class="d-flex gap-3 align-items-center flex-wrap justify-content-center mt-3">
        <a href="https://matrix.to/#/#lmu-open-science-center:matrix.lmu.de#/#lmu-open-science-center:matrix.lmu.de" class="btn btn-primary osc-init-contact-btn">
            <img src="images/idgGdCNeTC_logos-removebg-preview.png" style="height:25px;">
                OSC Matrix
        </a>
        <a href="https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/hackyhour" class="btn btn-outline-primary osc-init-contact-btn" rel="noopener">
            <i class="bi bi-bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> 
            Join Mailing list
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
```
